auth.label: API Application Key
auth.description: Cin7 Core API Application Key sent with the api-auth-applicationkey header. Create or view it with the Account ID on the Cin7 Core ExternalAPI setup page after signing in: https://inventory.dearsystems.com/ExternalAPI.

extraFields.label: Account ID
extraFields.description: Cin7 Core Account ID sent with the api-auth-accountid header. Create or view it with the API Application Key on the Cin7 Core ExternalAPI setup page after signing in: https://inventory.dearsystems.com/ExternalAPI.

actions.name: get_current_account
actions.description: Retrieve the Cin7 Core company and account settings for the connected account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to retrieve the connected Cin7 Core account.

outputSchema.description: The connected Cin7 Core account response.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve one Cin7 Core customer by customer ID.

id.description: The Cin7 Core customer ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: The Cin7 Core customer to retrieve.

raw.description: The raw Cin7 Core API response wrapper.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve one Cin7 Core product by product ID.

id.description: The Cin7 Core product ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: The Cin7 Core product to retrieve.

raw.description: The raw Cin7 Core API response wrapper.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List Cin7 Core customers with optional official filters and page pagination.

page.description: The one-indexed Cin7 Core page number to return.

limit.description: The number of records to return. Cin7 Core allows 1 to 1000.

id.description: Only return the customer with this Cin7 Core customer ID.

name.description: Only return customers whose name starts with this value.

contactFilter.description: Only return customers with contacts matching this Cin7 Core contact filter.

modifiedSince.description: Only return customers modified after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

includeDeprecated.description: Whether deprecated Cin7 Core customers should be included.

includeProductPrices.description: Whether customer product prices should be included in each returned customer.

inputSchema.description: The filters used to list Cin7 Core customers.

customers.description: The customers returned by Cin7 Core.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching Cin7 Core customers.
The Cin7 Core page number returned.

raw.description: The raw Cin7 Core API response wrapper.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Cin7 Core customers response.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List Cin7 Core products with optional official filters and page pagination.

page.description: The one-indexed Cin7 Core page number to return.

limit.description: The number of records to return. Cin7 Core allows 1 to 1000.

id.description: Only return the product with this Cin7 Core product ID.

name.description: Only return products whose name contains this value.

sku.description: Only return products whose SKU contains this value.

modifiedSince.description: Only return products modified after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

includeDeprecated.description: Whether deprecated Cin7 Core products should be included.

includeBOM.description: Whether bill of materials details should be included.

includeSuppliers.description: Whether supplier details should be included.

includeMovements.description: Whether product movement details should be included.

includeAttachments.description: Whether product attachment metadata should be included.

includeReorderLevels.description: Whether reorder level details should be included.

includeCustomPrices.description: Whether custom product prices should be included.

inputSchema.description: The filters used to list Cin7 Core products.

products.description: The products returned by Cin7 Core.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching Cin7 Core products.
The Cin7 Core page number returned.

raw.description: The raw Cin7 Core API response wrapper.

outputSchema.description: The paginated Cin7 Core products response.
